name: onboarding
description: Collect user identity, role, objective, and preferences; write a structured profile to /home/user/bot/user.md so future sessions are personalized.

inputs.name: conversation
inputs.description: Free-form Q&A with the user covering 3–5 short onboarding questions

outputs.name: user-profile
outputs.description: GLOBAL mode — structured profile (identity, objective, preferences), captured once

outputs.name: project-context
outputs.description: PROJECT mode — per-project brief, written once at project start (plus state.md init)
